rationale: Educ. Code §11.053 governs trustee terms after redistricting. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraisal values.
quote: Sec. 11.053. OPTION TO CONTINUE IN OFFICE FOLLOWING ADOPTION OF SINGLE-MEMBER PLAN OR REDISTRICTING.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no conflict exists.
